name: Construct 3
description: Browser-based 2D game engine with event-sheet logic requiring no coding. Exports to HTML5, Android, iOS, Windows, and Mac with a visual debugger and live preview.

seo.title: Construct 3 — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Construct 3: Browser-based 2D game engine with event-sheet logic requiring no coding. Exports to HTML5, Android, iOS, Windows, and Mac with a visual debugger an

when_to_use: No-code HTML5 game built and published to browser in a week
Educational game prototype created without programming skills
Game jam entry completed using event-sheet visual logic
Cross-platform casual game exported to Android and iOS
Interactive story game with branching scenes and animations

pros: Browser-based, no install, works on Chromebooks and iPads
Event sheets let non-coders ship real games
Live preview over LAN speeds iteration significantly
Exports cleanly to HTML5, Android, iOS, and desktop
cons: Subscription-only pricing with no perpetual option
No true source code access or custom plugins in C++
Performance ceiling lower than Unity for complex 3D
Visual logic becomes hard to debug in large projects
review.verdict: Best no-code 2D engine for classrooms and hobbyists; serious commercial teams will outgrow it fast.
review.best_for: Educators, designers, and hobbyists shipping 2D HTML5 games without coding
review.not_for: Teams wanting source control, custom engine extensions, or one-time licensing
